title: galium lucidum subsp. cinereum
intro: Galium lucidum subsp. cinereum, also known as Chinese Galium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bedstraw family that is native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Galium lucidum subsp. cinereum include its ability to relieve menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health issues. Galium lucidum subsp. cinereum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and experience its numerous health benefits.
